name: Nano Banana Pro Tool V3 - Gemini + imgbb
description: Image generator using Gemini 2.0 Flash with imgbb hosting (replaces file.io)

nodes.name: Enhance Prompt
nodes.notes: V4: Extraction robuste via extractPrompt() - supporte query.some_input, chatInput, etc.

nodes.name: Upload to imgbb
nodes.notes: imgbb.com API - replaces file.io. Query param: key (API key), Body: image (binary)

nodes.name: Format Output
nodes.notes: V3: Parse imgbb response, extract display_url, add provider: 'imgbb'

changes: Migrated from file.io to imgbb.com for image hosting
Enhanced prompt extraction with extractPrompt() function
Support for query.some_input, chatInput, and other input formats
